🎓 Structural biology and bioinformatics

| 🧑🏻‍💻 Data curation | 🎯 Translate protein structure into functional understanding

Ongoing projects

Haku, the Protein Structure Navigator

Streamlit app with a collection of tools to navigate proteins structures.

Previous projects

UniProt-VScode

Visual Studio Code extension that provides language support for reading and editing UniProt flatfiles.

TM annotations tool

Streamlit app that annotates transmembrane topology on protein structures using DeepTMHMM predictions and UniProt annotations.

UniProt Outreach

Using UniProt for protein structure-function analysis

This project is maintained by connyyu
